item.title: Dozens of Democrats to boycott Trump's State of the Union address
item.description: Dozens of Democrats are boycotting the State of the Union on Tuesday​, as many opt to hold nearby counterprogramming rather than signs of protests​ li...

item.title: Friend of U.S. citizen killed by ICE agent disputed official account of shooting
item.description: The close friend and passenger of a 23-year-old American citizen who was killed by an ICE agent in Texas last year disputed officials' account of the ...

item.title: 3 charts highlight the affordability issues Americans worry about most

item.title: Hegseth demands full military access to Anthropic's AI model, sets deadline
item.description: The Pentagon may decide to officially designate Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" to push them out of government, sources say.
